name: Azorella Dresser Oak Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Bring extra function and sleek style to your restful retreat with this Azorella Oak Dresser from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. The brown oak dresser strikes a clean-lined silhouette with carved, knotted detailing that complements a wide range of design aesthetics and color palettes. Designed with a spacious tabletop to place your alarm clock, lamp or a box of tissues, this dresser features three built-in drawers to offer ample space for your clothes and other essentials. Combine this dresser with coordinating pieces for a cohesive look in your bedroom.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
